option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: copy "G:\Projekte\server_ctrl\Plugin\BungeeCord\target\ServerCtrl_BungeeCord_*.jar" "E:\Spiele\minecraft test server\bungeecord\plugins"; copy "G:\Projekte\server_ctrl\Plugin\BungeeCord\target\ServerCtrl_BungeeCord_*.jar" "E:\Spiele\minecraft test server\bungeecord2\plugins"

task.summary: fixed design and start adding user management
Fixed Logs returning false success when no more found
Fixed name and reloading of config
Moved copying jar from maven goal to IntelliJ tasks
Fixed error message and console width
Reworked the architecture of the plugin to allow fore bungeecord support

MESSAGE.value: Moved copying jar from maven goal to IntelliJ tasks
Fixed error message and console width
Reworked the architecture of the plugin to allow fore bungeecord support
- Added backup functionality - improved password security
